title: Create : Bountiful Bites Compat
description: Adds compatibility between the Create mod and Bountiful Bites
body:
# Create : Bountiful Bites Compat
## Compatibility between the Create mod and Bountiful Bites.

This mod is a **lightweight compatibility mod** that allows you to make things from the [Bountiful Bites](https://modrinth.com/mod/bountiful-bites) mod and the [Create]([https://modrinth.com/mod/create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)) mod. These ways of crafting are better, as **they require less materials** for about the **same final amount of the result item**.

*Note : This mod will get updated along with [Bountiful Bites](https://modrinth.com/mod/bountiful-bites).*

## Credits
**MCreator** - For allowing me to make this Minecraft mod.

**Modrinth** - For allowing me to publish this Minecraft mod.
